title: LabelSubmission
description: Schema for active learning label submissions. Domain experts provide these labels to transition samples from Stage 1 to Stage 2 training data.

is_anomaly.description: Binary label: true = anomaly/defect, false = normal

defect_category.description: Optional defect category for multi-class classification. Examples: 'scratch', 'dent', 'discoloration', 'contamination'

confidence.description: Labeler's confidence in their assessment. Low confidence labels may be reviewed.

labeled_by.description: Identifier of the domain expert who provided the label

notes.description: Optional notes from the labeler about edge cases or ambiguity

bounding_box.description: Optional defect localization (for future spatial supervision)

review_status.description: Quality control status for the label

examples.notes: Visible diagonal scratch on upper-left quadrant
